title: pseudadelphos #5569
definition:
1) a false brother
 2) one who ostentatiously professes to be a Christian, but is
    destitute of Christian knowledge and piety
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a false brother
 2) one who ostentatiously professes to be a Christian, but is
    destitute of Christian knowledge and piety
